sp_widget.name: Alation SNow Integration UI
sp_widget.template:
Configuration Guide

Connect ServiceNow to Alation

{{::state.message}}
{{::state.error}}
Host must look like xyz.alationcloud.com
Create the OAuth Application Registry in Global scope with this exact name.
Create this user in Global scope and check Integration user on the user form.
Scope reminder: After creating the Global OAuth registry and user, switch scope to Alation DPM Integration for ServiceNow before saving these settings.
Stored securely (password2 sys_property) and not shown again.
Stored securely (password2 sys_property) and not shown again.
Not authorized.
